result.packet_rationale: All rows are broadly about correcting father/mother names in NID or identity-card records. I kept representative, self-contained examples, including central cases and specific-document/process variants. I flagged repetitive near-paraphrases within the packet, especially repeated generic questions about father's-name documents, mother's-name documents, and both-parents correction documents.
